EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISpeckleFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a speckle function for radar imagery.

[Guid("B8099FF7-E990-4418-AD03-EFBD626875D7")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISpeckleFunctionArguments

Properties

AdditiveNoiseMean

The mean additive noise. This parameter is used only for Lee filter with Additive and Multiplicative(both) noise models.

double AdditiveNoiseMean { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

DampFactor

The extent of damping applied. This parameter is used only for Enhanced Lee filter and Frost filter.

double DampFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

FilterSize

The size of the speckle filter kernel.

esriSpeckleFilterKernel FilterSize { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSpeckleFilterKernel

Examples

Sample Snippet

FilterType

The type of the speckle filter.

esriSpeckleFilterType FilterType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSpeckleFilterType

Examples

Sample Snippet

MultiplicativeNoiseMean

The mean multiplicative noise. This parameter is used only for Lee filter with Multiplicative or Additive and Multiplicative(both) noise models.

double MultiplicativeNoiseMean { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

NLooks

The number of looks. This parameter is used only for Lee filter with Multiplicative noise model as well as the Enhanced Lee filter.

int NLooks { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

NoiseModel

The speckle noise model. This parameter is used only for the Lee filter type.

esriSpeckleNoiseModel NoiseModel { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSpeckleNoiseModel

Examples

Sample Snippet

NoiseVariance

The noise variance. This parameter is used only for Lee filter with Additive or Additive and Multiplicative(both) noise models.

double NoiseVariance { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Raster

The source raster object.

object Raster { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet
